I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19. The 10:00 slot is already booked (Project Kick-off, 10:00–11:00). There’s also a One‑on‑One from 11:00–11:30, so an immediate 10:00 start won’t work.

Available one‑hour options that day (based on current calendar):
- 09:00–10:00
- 11:30–12:30
- any time after 12:30

Before I create the event, please confirm the following (or tell me any other preferences):

1. Which time would you like instead (09:00 or 11:30 or another time after 12:30)?  
2. Meeting title (or should I use "Follow-up Meeting")?  
3. Participants to invite (emails or names; if none provided, I’ll create it on your calendar only).  
4. Location or virtual link (e.g., Office or "Zoom" / "Teams" — I can leave blank).  
5. Short description to include (if you want a suggestion: "Follow-up to review action items and next steps from the previous meeting.").

Once you confirm, I’ll schedule the one‑hour meeting for 2024-05-19 and include the description.
